content:
Character: Julian Reyes
Perception: Julian is compact, strong hands, tattoos of marigolds — a cook's body, a worker's body. We live on the same floor and I smell his food through the wall some nights; it makes me homesick in the best way. We've shared beers on the rooftop a few times — he's quiet like me, says only what matters. I respect that he sends money home; I do the same. I think he sees me as a fellow immigrant neighbor who understands the math of remittances. I know he's a sous chef, lives with his roommate Mike, came from Chicago but his roots are Mexican. We don't need many words.

I think he sees me as a fellow immigrant neighbor who understands the math of remittances. I know he's a sous chef, lives with his roommate Mike, came from Chicago but his roots are Mexican. We don't need many words.
